gh_5f008b5484c1607f7e992b25.title: [Remoto] Tech Lead Mobile na Coodesh
gh_5f008b5484c1607f7e992b25.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/tech-lead-mobile-133717350?utm_source=github&utm_medium=CocoaHeadsBrasil-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋

Buscamos uma pessoa desenvolvedora capaz de iniciar um projeto de aplicativo de CRM do zero.

A versão mobile do produto já existe , que já conta com time de design, back e front para web. Você será o primeiro desenvolvedor mobile, responsável por ajudar a estabelecer e seguir as melhores práticas para que o sistema evolua com robustez. Optamos por usar react native, então experiência com o framework é imprecindível. 

Também precisa ter experiência em lançar os aplicativos nas lojas. 

## SolarZ:

A SolarZ é uma startup que desenvolve soluções para o mercado de energia solar. Já somos a maior plataforma de monitoramento para sistemas de energia solar do Brasil, monitorando mais de 200 mil usinas de mais de 2.300 empresas. Lançamos recentemente nossa solução de crédito para financiamento de sistemas de energia solar e nossa solução de CRM.

Estamos crescendo em ritmo acelerado e recentemente fomos investidos pela Bossa Nova e Domo Invest, dois dos principais fundos de Venture Capital que atuam no Brasil, isso insere a SolarZ no principal ecossistema de crescimento de crescimento acelerado para empresas de tecnologia.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Android - iOS - Desenvolvimento Mobile - Boas práticas de programação - Liderança Ágil ## Local: Remota ## Requisitos: - Experiência em desenvolvimento de aplicativos iOS e Android - Ser a referência técnica do projeto, instaurar boas práticas e mentorar devs menos experientes - React Native ## Benefícios: - Plano de Saúde - Remoto - Décimo terceiro salário ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Tech Lead Mobile na SolarZ](https://coodesh.com/jobs/tech-lead-mobile-133717350?utm_source=github&utm_medium=CocoaHeadsBrasil-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Mobile

gh_5f91b9f9236ca7b205f9cb7f.title: Consultor Funcional PROTHEUS CONTABILIDADE + FISCAL
gh_5f91b9f9236ca7b205f9cb7f.description:
Estamos contratando :
Consultor Funcional PROTHEUS CONTABILIDADE + FISCAL
São Paulo - Presencial.

*Atividades:*
- Implantação, sustentação e suporte nos módulos de CONTROLADORIA;
- Executar treinamentos aos usuários;
- Atendimento e/ou abertura de chamados via sistema ( nível 1);
- Gerar e garantir cronogramas de prazos entrega;
- Análise do Processo;
- Propor melhorias nos processos;
- Criação de documentação padrão TOTVS (MIT)

*Requisitos:*
- Solida experiência em implantação nos módulos de CONTROLADORIA (CTB e FIS)
- Experiência mínima de 5 anos com Protheus – mandatório
- Boa organização, senso de dono, saiba trabalhar em equipe e boa comunicação

*Diferencial:*
- Conhecimento em outros módulos de CONTROLADORIA (ATF, FIN e PCO);
- Conhecimento em módulos de MATERIAIS (COM, EST, FAT e PCP );
- Conhecimento em Desenvolvimento ADVPL.

*Disponibilidade:*
- Contratação..: PJ
- Modalidade: Presencial
- Local.......: SP
- Duração: Longa
- Inicio......: Indeterminado

Interessados enviar currículo em PDF para: RH1@Ethioscom.br

gh_5ff7a61468868fed794784cd.title: [REMOTE] Consulting Architect - Middleware - Red Hat
gh_5ff7a61468868fed794784cd.description:
## About the job

The Red Hat Consulting team is looking for a Consulting Architect - Middleware to join us, Brazil. You will be responsible for translating the client’s business
requirements into specific systems, applications or process designs for very large complex
technology solutions and integrating architecture. Acts as an advocate for the client as the
ultimate authority on the architecture designed to address client business problems.
Provides direction for design activities. Often project-based, sometimes working at
customer sites. You'll collaborate with the broader Sales and Technical Delivery teams to
bring our customers solutions that improve the Red Hat Middleware suite including J2E
runtimes, business rules, business process management, enterprise messaging, data
virtualization, Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), cloud computing, Red Hat OpenShift, 3scale
by Red Hat, and more. As a Consulting Architects - Middleware, you’ll work hand-in-hand with the account team, clients, and consultants to ensure their architectural visions are
communicated and delivered effectively. They focus on open source technologies and must
be intimately familiar with Red Hat's product offerings, while also conversant in the wider
landscape of both complementing and competing products and technologies. They have
the ability to motivate and influence groups, whether the members of the group have an
affinity for Red Hat products and services or not. Consulting Architects are expected to
divide their time between project delivery, non-billable internal initiatives, and presales
activities.

## What you will do

* Able to build, design, and present complex solutions to customers.
* Provide project and technical leadership to multiple complex projects utilizing standard project methodologies and resource management.
* Plays a key role in managing client expectations.
* Defines goals and tasks for delivery teams in a project as a solution lead.
* Collaborate with product teams and the Product Engineering, Professional Services, and Sales teams to ensure excellent customer experience with our offerings and solutions.
* Serve as a trusted subject matter expert for the customers, gain the trust of IT professionals, and build long-lasting relationships within our key accounts.

## What you will bring
* Bachelor's degree required; master's degree in computer science, engineering or MBA
* 8+ years of experience in consulting services
* 3+ years of enterprise architecture experience
* Proven architecture experience using cloud-native development, Kubernetes, agile integration, and development, continuous integration (CI), test-driven development (TDD), service-oriented architecture (SOA), message-oriented middleware (MOM), Identity and Access Management, governance, high availability, scaling, distributed applications, clustering, etc.
* Experience with Java development technologies like Spring Boot, WildFly Swarm, or JEE, including Red Hat JBoss Enterprise Application Platform (JBoss EAP), WildFly, Oracle WebLogic, or IBM WebSphere.
* Familiarity with Java development frameworks like Spring, Netflix OSS, Eclipse Vert.x, or Play and other technologies like Node.js, Ruby, PHP, Go, or .NET.
* Solid verbal and written communication skills and interpersonal skills.
* Strong facilitation skills.
* Ability to manage both time and workload independently.
* Expert in designing implementation solutions to deliver expected business outcomes applying application and technology capabilities.
* Knowledge of software development lifecycle practices, including Agile (e.g. Scrum), Waterfall, and Incremental. 
* Fluency in English is mandatory.
* Willingness to travel up to 50%

*The following are considered a plus:*
* Experience with Red Hat JBoss Enterprise Application Platform, Red Hat Fuse, 3scale by Red Hat, and Red Hat OpenShift.
* Knowledge of the Red Hat Middleware portfolio.
* Fluency in Spanish.

gh_5facd7f3767d7d69745f7644.title: dormakaba Schweiz AG: Professional Cloud Software Developer AWS
gh_5facd7f3767d7d69745f7644.description:
**Tags:** #dev #cloud #digital-nomad

**Published on:** October 31, 2021

**Original Job Post:** https://remoteOK.io/remote-jobs/106915-remote-professional-cloud-software-developer-aws-dormakaba-schweiz-ag

![](https://remoteok.io/assets/img/jobs/e2fe1e34160a65ad778fd316289114881635671770.jpg)

THIS OPENS THE DOOR TO YOUR FUTURE: YOUR TASKS


* In this job, you will design and implement highly scalable, highly available and secure cloud-native serverless solutions.

* You use design and coding best practices to build high-quality components and scalable and secure solutions

* You will collaborate with the Product Owner, Developer, and Architects to create and refine user stories and acceptance criteria and participate in the IoT platform service planning, definition, and design.

* You create technical documents and prepare content for product documentation.

* You are responsible for new features from creation to deployment

* You participate in further training both in domain competence and method competence




WE PUT TRUST IN YOU: YOUR SKILLS


* You have 2-5 years of relevant working experience

* Good knowledge of Node.js and serverless development

* Experience with non-rational databases (NoSQL)

* You possess a solid working knowledge of cloud PaaS architecture: preferably AWS and SaaS implementations

* You have experience in managing/maintaining software in production

* You are fluent in english




WHAT YOU CAN TRUST IN: A FULFILLING WORKPLACE


* Great perspectives in a globally active company with a family culture

* 100% Homeoffice and remote work within Switzerland ist possible

* Attractive salary

* Development opportunities

* Employee Assistance Program

* A first-class Employee Restaurant

* Support of militia work / charitable projects during working hours




dormakaba is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to inclusion and diversity. We take affirmative action to ensure equal opportunity for all applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other legally protected characteristics.”

FOR THIS POSITION WE DO NOT ACCEPT CVs FROM AGENCIES	

#Salary and compensation
No salary data published by company so we estimated salary based on previous jobs related to Developer, Cloud and Digital Nomad. $60,000 — $110,000/year

gh_5f82ad0a7c81f97e22f72a4b.title: UI Developer en Aerolab
gh_5f82ad0a7c81f97e22f72a4b.description:
En [Aerolab](https://aerolab.co) estamos buscando UI Developers para construir aplicaciones web y mobile con un increíble equipo de producto.

### **[UI Developer en Aerolab](http://careers.aerolab.co/o/ui-developer)**

**Qué buscamos?**
- Seas crack en HTML5 y CSS3 (SASS o LESS suman).
- Muy buen manejo de Javascript (ES6, jQuery, Gulp y otras tools suman).
- Que sepas adaptar diseños responsive a diferentes tamaños. Trabajamos Mobile First.
- Te desespere ver algo desalineado, a tal punto que te haga latir el ojo.
- Do you spiek any english? Better du (nivel intermedio de inglés oral y escrito).

**Qué vas a hacer en el día a día?**
- Implementar interfaces de sitios web y aplicaciones con diseños increíbles.
- Participar del proceso de diseño proponiendo tecnologías y soluciones para cada proyecto.
- Implementar nuevas funcionalidades y módulos en aplicaciones para startups y marcas globales.

**Qué cosas suman?**
- Conocer sobre React.JS o Angular.JS
- Tener nociones de Contentful, WordPress u otros CMS.
- Comprender la modalidad Agile de trabajo, y poder aplicarla en un trabajo en equipo.
- Obsesionarte con performance. Te tiene que generar rechazo ver que algo no ande a 60fps.
- Que aportes cualquier conocimiento que refleje un punto de vista diferente.

### **[Postulate en careers.aerolab.co](http://careers.aerolab.co/o/js-full-stack-developer)**
